summary: V3 review: glowing Pluto logo on scroll, full responsiveness, trending reorder, music chatter bot, Share bottom-sheet redesign, sticky CreatePostModal, YouTube external link gating. Backend: 26/26 pytest cases pass (existing 21 regression + 5 new V3 tests). /api/topics returns 8 topics with correct slugs. /api/posts?topic=music shows bot_music_chatter posts (3+) with sources music-chatter:music_lyric and music-chatter:music_update; chatter posts have non-zero hugs (e.g., 70). /api/posts/trending returns posts including music-chatter ones. Frontend: TopicsGrid renders cards in exact order [crypto, music, mental-health, confession, sports, memes, rant, stories]. Trending feed sort verified — DOM order Crypto → Music → Mental Health → Confession → Memes (ranks [0,1,2,3,99] strictly ascending). Logo shimmer: .pluto-logo-shining class appears on 2 elements (logo wrap + sphere wrap) while window is scrolling and is removed once scroll settles. CreatePostModal opens via header-create-btn on mobile (390x844), close-create-modal works (modal hidden after click), create-post-submit is sticky at bottom (top 779, vh 844). ShareCardModal validated on /topics on both 1920x1080 desktop and 390x844 mobile: all 7 testids visible (share-x-btn, share-instagram-btn, share-tiktok-btn, share-facebook-btn, share-native-btn, share-copy-link, share-socials-row). On mobile share row sits at bottom (top 758/bottom 831 of vh 844) — true bottom-sheet sticky bar. No horizontal page overflow on desktop, mobile, or with modals open. Music page shows 18 cards; 0 YouTube cards render an open-* external link (Spotify cards do). 11 posts on /topics?topic=music including chatter posts.
critical_code_review_comments: bot_service.py music chatter implementation looks well structured with 4 template arrays (NEWS/ARTIST/LYRIC/VIRAL) — consider deduping content if the random pool is small to avoid repeated posts.
Engagement bump loop (every 15s) plus 120s bot interval means chatter posts accumulate hugs steadily — sample showed 70 hugs on a recently seeded lyric post, behavior matches spec.
Landing.jsx trendList uses a stable sort by topic priority — clean implementation; fallback FALLBACK_POSTS already contains one post per topic for deterministic UX.
MusicCard.jsx correctly gates the external 'Open original' link on `track.provider !== 'youtube'` (line 334) — verified in DOM.
ShareCardModal bottom-sheet rendering on mobile is correct (sticky socials row at bottom of viewport, safe-area aware); on desktop renders centered modal — confirmed via bounding-box probes.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_v3_features.py (new — V3 feature tests for topics order, music chatter bot, trending sort)
test_credentials: Mod key: pluto-mod-2026 (X-Mod-Key header / /mod-station password). Device IDs auto-generated; anonymous flow.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed posts and music tracks (auto-expire 24h). Backend bot has auto-seeded music chatter posts under device_id=bot_music_chatter (3 visible during run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression: /app/backend/tests/test_pluto_api.py + /app/backend/tests/test_v3_features.py (26 tests). Run: `cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend critical testids: header-create-btn / landing-cta-post (open composer), create-post-modal/close-create-modal/create-post-submit (composer), share-btn-{postId} on PostCards opens ShareCardModal with testids share-x-btn / share-instagram-btn / share-tiktok-btn / share-facebook-btn / share-native-btn / share-copy-link / share-socials-row. Topic cards: topic-card-{slug}. Trending rows: trending-row-{postId} (no data-topic attr — read topic from inner span text). Music cards: music-card-{id}, play-{id}, hug-{id}, fug-{id}, open-{id} (Spotify only). Logo shimmer classes: .pluto-logo-shining + .pluto-logo-shimmer / .pluto-sphere-shimmer activated by useScrollShine hook in /app/frontend/src/components/Logo.jsx.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 7 features from review-request work end-to-end on backend (26/26 pytest) and frontend (desktop 1920x1080, mobile 390x844 verified via Playwright).
